suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen rust-worker RED-first TDD enforcement by requiring transcript evidence of failing test additions before implementation edits, and mark handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false when this sequence is not met.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The same deviation appears in both operations sessions 1f57ddc0-16c4-48c4-aa45-e77ab7a355ba and 455836c5-7ad7-48fc-9327-b9fdc08f299a: code edits preceded new fix test additions while handoff still reported procedure followed.
